---
title: "On Yer Bike: Joining the sustainable transport revolution"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2012). On Yer Bike: Joining the sustainable transport revolution. *Now Then*."
date: "2012-12-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_yer_2012"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Now Then"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-57/on-yer-bike/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "The Cases in Marketing provides a bridge between course textbooks and key real-world examples. The On Yer Bike! case study summarizes and examines the scenario and includes supporting commentary from Paul Baines, Chris Fill, Sara Rosengren, and Paolo Antonetti."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Now Then
**Year:** 2012

[URL](http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-57/on-yer-bike/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

The Cases in Marketing provides a bridge between course textbooks and key real-world examples. The On Yer Bike! case study summarizes and examines the scenario and includes supporting commentary from Paul Baines, Chris Fill, Sara Rosengren, and Paolo Antonetti.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2012). On Yer Bike: Joining the sustainable transport revolution. *Now Then*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_yer_2012,
	title = {On {Yer} {Bike}: {Joining} the sustainable transport revolution},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-57/on-yer-bike/},
	abstract = {The Cases in Marketing provides a bridge between course textbooks and key real-world examples. The On Yer Bike! case study summarizes and examines the scenario and includes supporting commentary from Paul Baines, Chris Fill, Sara Rosengren, and Paolo Antonetti.},
	journal = {Now Then},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = dec,
	year = {2012},
	keywords = {bicycle},
	pages = {23--24},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
